title: oreocharis aurantiaca
intro: Oreocharis aurantiaca, also known as the golden Oreocharis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is an evergreen perennial that is native to China and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Oreocharis aurantiaca typically involve the use of its leaves and roots, which can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
